_comment: Model file for Borg autoresearch - trace format optimization
_instructions: This file is the ONLY file the autoresearch agent modifies. Do not modify eval_harness.py or other infrastructure.

trace_format._comment_capture_threshold: Min tool calls before extracting trace. Lower = more traces but more noise.
trace_format._comment_max_files_tracked: Max files to track (prevents memory bloat)
trace_format._comment_max_errors_tracked: Max errors to store per session
trace_format._comment_include_dead_ends: Include files read multiple times but never modified (may be dead ends)
trace_format._comment_include_tool_sequence: Include full tool call sequence (high token cost, rarely helpful)
trace_format._comment_min_session_duration: Min session length to capture (skip trivial interactions)

matching._comment_top_k: Return top_k matches. Higher = more chance of help, lower = less dilution
matching._comment_min_match_score: Minimum match score threshold. Higher = precision, lower = recall

signals._comment_error_type: Bonus for matching error types (TypeError, ImportError, etc)
signals._comment_tech_match: Bonus for same technology (django, flask, etc)

filters._comment_decay: Apply 0.9 decay to traces not shown in 30 days

injection._comment_key_files: Include 'KEY FILES: file1, file2' in trace

pack_structure._comment_packs_vs_traces: Set true to use workflow packs instead of traces for this experiment

exploration_order.description: Test immediate trace injection vs delayed
Test verbose trace format vs concise

success_criteria._comment_negative_transfer: Tasks where B is WORSE than A (should be 0)
